userStories.story: As a student, I want to navigate through lessons sequentially so that I can complete a course in order
criteria: Given I am on a lesson page
When I click the next lesson button
Then I am taken to the next lesson in the sequence

userStories.story: As a student, I want to go back to the previous lesson so that I can review content without losing my place
criteria: Given I am on a lesson page
When I click the back button
Then I am taken to the previous lesson

userStories.story: As a student, I want to see my progress through a lesson's exercises so that I know how much is left
criteria: Given I am on a lesson with multiple exercises
Then I see a progress indicator showing my position

userStories.story: As a student, I want to see a 404 page when a lesson doesn't exist so that I understand the content is unavailable
criteria: Given I navigate to a non-existent lesson URL
Then I see a 404 error page
